marketName: Air-Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment Manufacturing
coreJobStatement: Manufacture climate control and thermal management equipment that conditions, heats, cools, or refrigerates enclosed spaces and stored goods to specified temperature and humidity setpoints.

l6Systems.name: Sheet Metal Fabrication
l6Systems.jobFamily: Cut, form, punch, and bend sheet metal into enclosure and structural components

l6Systems.name: Heat Exchanger Fabrication
l6Systems.jobFamily: Manufacture coils, condensers, and evaporator assemblies by bending tubing and attaching fins
l6Systems.scope: OT-1, OT-2, OT-4, OT-5, OT-6, OT-7

l6Systems.name: Refrigerant Circuit Assembly
l6Systems.jobFamily: Braze/weld tubing connections, mount compressor, expansion device, and reversing valve into integrated refrigerant circuit
l6Systems.scope: OT-1, OT-2, OT-4, OT-5, OT-6, OT-7

l6Systems.name: Combustion Assembly
l6Systems.jobFamily: Assemble burner, heat exchanger, gas valve, ignition, and flue components into heating module

l6Systems.name: Electrical & Controls Integration
l6Systems.jobFamily: Wire motors, contactors, sensors, control boards, and communication interfaces into the unit

l6Systems.name: Hydronic Circuit Assembly
l6Systems.jobFamily: Assemble water-side piping, circulation pumps, flow sensors, and hydraulic components for water-based heat exchange

l6Systems.name: System Evacuation & Refrigerant Charging
l6Systems.jobFamily: Evacuate system to vacuum, leak-test, charge with specified refrigerant mass
l6Systems.scope: OT-1, OT-2, OT-4, OT-5, OT-6, OT-7

l6Systems.name: Final Assembly & Enclosure
l6Systems.jobFamily: Mount all sub-assemblies into cabinet, attach panels, insulation, labels, and shipping hardware

l6Systems.name: Performance Testing & Certification
l6Systems.jobFamily: Run functional test, verify capacity/efficiency against AHRI/UL/CE standards, pass or reject

l6Systems.name: Quality Assurance
l6Systems.jobFamily: Verify dimensional integrity, material compliance, and process adherence at each gate (horizontal)

l6Systems.name: Maintenance & Engineering
l6Systems.jobFamily: Maintain production equipment uptime, tooling calibration, and process engineering (horizontal)

l6Systems.name: HSE & Environmental Compliance
l6Systems.jobFamily: Manage refrigerant handling (EPA Section 608), brazing fume extraction, noise, and worker safety (horizontal)

l6Systems.name: Utilities & Facility Management
l6Systems.jobFamily: Supply compressed air, nitrogen, electrical power, HVAC, and water to production floor (horizontal)

l6Systems.name: IT / Operations Technology
l6Systems.jobFamily: Manage MES, ERP, CNC program distribution, test data acquisition, and traceability (horizontal)

vnUnits.name: CNC Punch Press
vnUnits.functionalJob: Automated sheet metal punching and forming machine

vnUnits.name: Press Brake
vnUnits.functionalJob: Sheet metal bending and forming machine

vnUnits.name: Powder Coating Line
vnUnits.functionalJob: Surface finishing and corrosion protection system

vnUnits.name: Tube Bender
vnUnits.functionalJob: Bend copper/aluminum tubing into coil patterns

vnUnits.name: Fin Press
vnUnits.functionalJob: Stamp and form aluminum fins for coil assembly

vnUnits.name: Coil Expansion Press
vnUnits.functionalJob: Mechanically expand tubes into fin collars for thermal contact

vnUnits.name: Brazing Station
vnUnits.functionalJob: Join tubing and headers via brazing

vnUnits.name: Compressor
vnUnits.functionalJob: Compress refrigerant vapor to raise pressure and temperature

vnUnits.name: Expansion Device
vnUnits.functionalJob: Meter refrigerant flow and reduce pressure before evaporator

vnUnits.name: Reversing Valve
vnUnits.functionalJob: Switch refrigerant flow between heating and cooling modes

vnUnits.name: Refrigerant Piping
vnUnits.functionalJob: Connect refrigerant circuit components with brazed tubing

vnUnits.name: Gas Burner
vnUnits.functionalJob: Combust fuel to generate heat for warm air furnace

vnUnits.name: Combustion Heat Exchanger
vnUnits.functionalJob: Transfer combustion heat to airflow stream

vnUnits.name: Gas Valve
vnUnits.functionalJob: Regulate fuel flow to burner assembly

vnUnits.name: Ignition Module
vnUnits.functionalJob: Ignite fuel-air mixture in combustion chamber

vnUnits.name: Control Board
vnUnits.functionalJob: Manage unit operation logic, sequencing, and diagnostics

vnUnits.name: Variable Frequency Drive
vnUnits.functionalJob: Modulate compressor and fan motor speed for efficiency

vnUnits.name: Fan / Blower Motor
vnUnits.functionalJob: Drive airflow across coils or through ductwork

vnUnits.name: Sensor Suite
vnUnits.functionalJob: Measure temperature, pressure, flow, and refrigerant state

vnUnits.name: Circulation Pump
vnUnits.functionalJob: Drive water/glycol through heat exchanger circuit

vnUnits.name: Plate Heat Exchanger
vnUnits.functionalJob: Transfer thermal energy between refrigerant and water circuits

vnUnits.name: Flow Sensor
vnUnits.functionalJob: Measure water-side volumetric flow rate for system control and protection. MARQUARDT PRIMARY — ultrasonic transit-time sensor (Marquardt) leads at 35% share; competing: turbine/impeller (30%), vortex (15%), differential pressure (10%), paddle/float switch (10%).

vnUnits.name: Hydraulic Valve Assembly
vnUnits.functionalJob: Control water routing, bypass, and safety in hydronic circuit

vnUnits.name: Vacuum Pump Station
vnUnits.functionalJob: Evacuate refrigerant system to remove moisture and non-condensables

vnUnits.name: Leak Detection Station
vnUnits.functionalJob: Verify system integrity before refrigerant charging

vnUnits.name: Refrigerant Charging Station
vnUnits.functionalJob: Dispense precise refrigerant mass into sealed system

vnUnits.name: Cabinet Assembly Fixtures
vnUnits.functionalJob: Position and fasten enclosure panels around sub-assemblies

vnUnits.name: Insulation Application
vnUnits.functionalJob: Apply thermal and acoustic insulation to equipment cabinet

vnUnits.name: Psychrometric Test Chamber
vnUnits.functionalJob: Simulate operating conditions to verify capacity and efficiency

vnUnits.name: Electrical Safety Test Station
vnUnits.functionalJob: Hi-pot, ground continuity, and insulation resistance testing

vnUnits.name: Run-Test Station
vnUnits.functionalJob: Functional verification of startup, operation, and shutdown

marquardtPosition: The Marquardt Ultrasonic Flow Sensor occupies the Flow Sensor (L5) position within L6.6 — Hydronic Circuit Assembly. This L6 node is activated only by OT-2 (water-source heat pumps) and OT-5 (water-cooled chillers). Competing technologies at this position: turbine/impeller (30%), vortex (15%), differential pressure (10%), paddle/float switch (10%). A secondary position exists at L6.5 — Electrical & Controls Integration, Sensor Suite sub-position (20% flow-sensor share).
